sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_portal"> <sys_portal action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <dropzone/> <offset/> <page display_value="PA Escalations Overview">3adfee7d53af00100c54ddeeff7b124c</page> <summary>My On-Call Groups</summary> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2020-03-15 10:18:46</sys_created_on> <sys_id>29153e3153ef00100c54ddeeff7b128b</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2020-03-21 06:29:52</sys_updated_on> </sys_portal> </record_update>
